title: 1.4 Feedback System
content: Criteria 1 1.1 Curriculum Design and Development 1.1.1 Curricula relevance to the Local, National, Regional and Global Developmental needs 1.1.2 Programmes with Syllabus Revision 1.1.3 Courses having focuses on Employability / Entrepreneurship / Skill development 1.2 Academic Flexibility 1.2.1 New Courses Introduced 1.2.2 CBCS / Elective Course System 1.3 Curriculum Enrichment 1.3.1 Integration of Cross Cutting Issues in Curriculum 1.3.2 Value Added Courses & CR 1.3.3 List of Students enrolled in Value Added Courses 1.3.4 Field Projects / Research Projects / Internships 1.4 Feedback System 1.4.1 Structured Feedback 1.4.2 Feedback Analysis & Action Taken 1.4 Feedback System 1.4.1 Structured Feedback 1.4.2 Feedback Analysis & Action Taken
